
func (s *Server) handlePOSTPreview(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sess, _, ok := s.auth(w, r)
	if !ok {
		return
	}
	body, err := s.app.POSTPreview(sess)
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, nil, "handling action App.Preview", err)
		return
	}
	genericHead := s.app.Head(r)
	if err := s.writeHTML(
		w, r, sess, genericHead, nil, body, nil,
	); err != nil {
		s.logErr("rendering response of App.POSTPreview", err)
		return
	}
}
